parameters.name: vth
parameters.override_behavior: sets clk, rst, up, and dn logic threshold

parameters.name: step
parameters.override_behavior: sets control-voltage movement per sampled exclusive request

modeling_constraints: Represent charge-pump requests as sampled voltage-domain state updates.
Do not use current contributions, ddt(), idt(), transistor-level devices, or validation side channels.

properties.observable_contract: When rst is high, vctrl resets to the midpoint of vmin and vmax and metric is 0.45 V.
A rising clock crossing sampling up high and dn low increases vctrl by step and encodes metric at 0.75 V.
A rising clock crossing sampling dn high and up low decreases vctrl by step and encodes metric at 0.15 V.
A rising clock crossing sampling both or neither request holds vctrl and encodes metric at 0.45 V.
Repeated sampled movement cannot drive vctrl below vmin or above vmax.
Changes on up or dn between rising clock crossings do not immediately change vctrl.

title: Charge Pump Abstraction
